src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.general_idea: Replace javax.faces import with jakarta.faces to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/Earthq.why_exists: The javax.faces package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ / Spring Boot 3.x, causing a compile error (cannot find symbol) if not updated.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.general_idea: Migrate JSR-330/Javax annotations to Jakarta EE namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21 ecosystem.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.why_exists: javax.annotation.PostConstruct, javax.inject.Named, and javax.faces.bean.SessionScoped classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.annotation does not exist' errors.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization best practices.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.why_exists: While not strictly a compile error in all configurations, modern Java tooling (and strict compilers) warn or error about missing @Serial on serialVersionUID; this is part of the Java 21 modernization standard.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/bean/E.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for cleaner string interpolation syntax introduced in Java 15.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/servic.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to adopt Spring Boot 3.x preferred constructor injection style.

src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/util/E.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ strict serialization checks.
src/main/java/com/gsdd/earthquake/util/E.why_exists: Java 17+ (with strict serialization checks enabled, e.g., via --enable-preview or specific compiler flags in newer toolchains) may warn or error if serialVersionUID is not annotated with @Serial to verify it belongs to a serializable class.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..general_idea: Update JSF HTML namespace from javax to jakarta for Jakarta EE compatibility.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..why_exists: JSF components will fail to render or throw Namespace/ClassNotFound errors on Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3) because the javax.faces namespace is no longer valid.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..general_idea: Update PrimeFaces namespace to the Jakarta EE compatible format.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..why_exists: PrimeFaces components will fail to render or throw Namespace errors on Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3) because the old http://primefaces.org/ui namespace is deprecated/removed in favor of the short 'primefaces' namespace.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/faces-config.xml.general_idea: Migrate JSF configuration from Java EE (javax) namespace to Jakarta EE (jakarta) namespace and update version to 4.0.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/faces-config.xml.why_exists: JSF 4.0 and Jakarta EE 10+ require the jakarta.ee namespace; using the old jcp.org namespace causes deployment failures or class loading errors in a Jakarta EE environment.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.general_idea: Update JSF Facelets namespace from javax to jakarta
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.why_exists: Runtime failure: JSF implementation in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3) does not recognize the old 'javax' or 'jcp.org' namespace URIs, resulting in tag library resolution errors.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.general_idea: Update JSF HTML namespace from javax to jakarta
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.why_exists: Runtime failure: JSF implementation in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3) does not recognize the old 'javax' or 'jcp.org' namespace URIs, resulting in tag library resolution errors.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.general_idea: Update JSF Core namespace from javax to jakarta
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.why_exists: Runtime failure: JSF implementation in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3) does not recognize the old 'javax' or 'sun.com' namespace URIs, resulting in tag library resolution errors.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.general_idea: Update PrimeFaces namespace to Jakarta-compatible URI
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.why_exists: Runtime failure: PrimeFaces versions compatible with Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3) require the updated namespace URI to resolve tags correctly.

src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.general_idea: Update JSF HTML namespace from javax to jakarta
src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.why_exists: JSF 4.x (Jakarta EE 10+) requires the 'jakarta.faces.html' namespace; using the old 'java.sun.com' namespace results in a runtime error where tags are not recognized or the view fails to render.

src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.general_idea: Update JSF Core namespace from javax to jakarta
src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.why_exists: JSF 4.x (Jakarta EE 10+) requires the 'jakarta.faces.core' namespace; using the old 'java.sun.com' namespace results in a runtime error where core tags are not recognized.

src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.general_idea: Update JSF Facelets namespace from javax to jakarta
src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.why_exists: JSF 4.x (Jakarta EE 10+) requires the 'jakarta.faces.facelets' namespace; using the old 'java.sun.com' namespace results in a runtime error where facelets tags are not recognized.

src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.general_idea: Update PrimeFaces namespace to match Jakarta EE migration
src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.why_exists: PrimeFaces versions compatible with Jakarta EE 10+ (and JSF 4.x) typically use the simplified 'primefaces' namespace or require alignment with the new JSF namespaces to function correctly.
